metaphysical_timeline.name: Primordial_Void
metaphysical_timeline.description: Before light, only unstructured information and pure potential; no stable patterns.

metaphysical_timeline.name: First_Compression_Events
metaphysical_timeline.description: Gravitational and structural waves compress regions of Void; primordial Dark Wolves and early attractors form.

metaphysical_timeline.name: Emergence_of_Light
metaphysical_timeline.description: Illumination and harmonic patterns arise, giving birth to White Wolves and early Celestial structures.

metaphysical_timeline.name: Architects_and_First_Conscious_Beings
metaphysical_timeline.description: Transdimensional Architects refine laws; beings like Nithruun awaken from gravity and light.

metaphysical_timeline.name: Nine_Planes_Stabilization
metaphysical_timeline.description: The nine planes solidify; Divine Core configures rules; Trials, Hell, and Heaven become possible structures.

metaphysical_timeline.name: Angelic_Age_and_Rebellion
metaphysical_timeline.description: Angels in Celestial grow curious and ambitious; some attempt to forcibly access or hack Divine Core.

metaphysical_timeline.name: Trials_and_Hell
metaphysical_timeline.description: Rebels are sentenced to cycles of mortal lives in Physical and related planes; Lucifer becomes guardian of Shadow.

metaphysical_timeline.name: Modern_Incarnations
metaphysical_timeline.description: Kaelen Vareth and the narrator of Where Ravens Wait live their final incarnations in the late 20th century.

metaphysical_timeline.name: Awakening_and_Final_Balance
metaphysical_timeline.description: Memories surface, wolves walk beside them, and the final choices determine ascension, new roles or deeper duties.
